title: HR Analyst - Workday Data Administration
description: This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for an HR Analyst - Workday Data Administration based in India.This role plays a key part in delivering accurate, timely, and high-quality HR transactional support within a global shared services environment.
